title: Minecraft: Evolved Edition
description: A fresh new take on a Vanilla+ modpack that adds plenty of new content while remaining faithful to the original game.
body:
![banner text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d6f8f07530f4c5d30d291ef282e21e5c35e487b.png)
## Description
Have you ever wanted a Minecraft modpack that doesn't drift too far from the original game but still adds plenty of new content? If so, **Minecraft: Evolved Edition** is the perfect choice. This modpack brings many needed tweaks and new content while remaining faithful to the vanilla Minecraft experience.
## Features
- **A World That Wants to be Explored:** Play a proper adventure experience that forces you to actually explore your world with mods like [Better Archeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-archeology) and [End Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/endrem). 
- **Quality-of-Life Tweaks:** Enjoy a smoother experience with useful mods like [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) and [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei).
- **Better World Generation:** Explore new diverse and unique environments with [Lithosphere](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lithosphere) and [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit).
- **Diverse Wildlife:** Discover a wide new variety of mobs that interact with one another with [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs) and [More Mob Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-mob-variants).
- **Improved Immersion:** Feel more immersed in your world with the help of mods like [First Person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) and [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons).
- **Visual Upgrades:** Experience simple or stunning textures and graphics with mods like [Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify) and [Oculus](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus).
- **And it's all well optimized?:** Despite the almost 250+ mod size, this pack is well optimized thanks to mods such as [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) and [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric).
## Other Notes
Please note that this modpack isn't perfect, and that there may be small issues with it. This is my first modpack, and I plan to maintain this modpack and release frequent updates. So if there are any issues, report them to the [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/toastdot39/Minecraft-Evolved-Edition/issues) and I will do my best to fix the problem.
